title: Hammered Mace
description: This Resource Pack changes the mace's model and texture to a battle hammer!
body:
This resource pack edits the mace's model and texture to become a frightening battle hammer!

Enjoy!

If you want to leave feedback or comment on the pack in general, head over to [curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/hammered-mace) and write a comment :D
